governance_gates.L0_system: Strategic direction - Martin Hilti Family Trust (1-2 decisions/year)
governance_gates.L1_strategic: Market entry, M&A, platform bets (CEO + Board, 8-12/year)
governance_gates.L2_tactical: Product launches, pricing, regional initiatives (BU Leaders, ~210/year)

hierarchy.note: Family trust ownership enables L0 long-term decisions without quarterly pressure

how_complementarity.description: Key interaction effects in Hilti's business model

direct_sales_x_fleet_mgmt.insight: Direct sales relationship enables Fleet Management upsell - strongest synergy

hardware_x_software.insight: Nuron battery platform creates lock-in to Hilti digital ecosystem

innovation_x_talent.insight: 8% R&D intensity requires top engineering talent

brand_x_pricing_power.insight: Premium brand enables value-based pricing across all segments

firestop_x_regulation.insight: Fire protection regulation tightening drives Firestop demand

field_sales_x_customer_data.insight: 10K field reps generate unique customer intelligence

how_complementarity.value_creation_formula: V = Sum E(d) + Sum gamma_ij * sqrt(E(d) * E(d'))

when_context.description: Psi dimensions for Hilti's operating context

psi_social.rationale: Skilled labor shortage in construction industry

psi_cultural.rationale: Innovation-friendly culture, Great Place to Work

what_utility_weights.description: Strategic utility dimension weights for Hilti

financial_F.note: Profit important but not dominant (trust ownership)

social_S.note: Great Place to Work, stakeholder value

who_aggregation.note: Direct sales model means WHO is directly known (not intermediary)

aware.note: Field sales provides real-time market awareness; digital tools expanding

ready.note: Trust ownership + strong balance sheet = high readiness for strategic moves

stage.description: Mid-transformation: Hardware-to-Services transition, Nuron platform established, digital ecosystem growing

integration_summary.WHO: Firm-level, 210 L2 decisions, direct customer relationships
integration_summary.HOW: Very high complementarity (gamma_avg=0.68) - direct sales x fleet x digital
integration_summary.WHEN: Favorable context (Psi_avg=0.75) - infrastructure cycle + digital urgency
integration_summary.AWARE: Moderate monitoring (45%) - field sales + digital expanding
integration_summary.READY: High readiness (WAX=0.88) - trust ownership enables long-term bets
integration_summary.STAGE: Mid-transformation (S=0.55) - hardware to services pivot underway
